name: clickup
description: ClickUp task read/write — list, spaces, tasks, comments, custom fields. Drop-in alternative to the Jira adapter for teams on ClickUp.

tools.name: clickup_get_task
tools.description: Fetch a ClickUp task by ID. Returns name, description, status, assignees, custom fields, and checklist items.

tools.name: clickup_search_tasks
tools.description: Search tasks using ClickUp filters (list, space, status, assignee). Returns task IDs and summaries.

tools.name: clickup_create_task
tools.description: Create a new ClickUp task in a list. Used at the start of the requirements stage when the user has not provided a task ID. Returns the new task's ID.

tools.name: clickup_update_status
tools.description: Move a task to a new status (e.g. 'in progress', 'in review', 'complete').

tools.name: clickup_add_comment
tools.description: Post a comment to a ClickUp task. Use to surface PR URLs, validator reports, and blockers.

tools.name: clickup_post_status_update
tools.description: Post a humanized status update + the next stage's command to a task. Called by the orchestrator at every stage boundary. The post is in plain text (ClickUp markdown) and includes the next slash command to run.

tools.name: clickup_set_custom_field
tools.description: Set a custom field value. Use to link tasks to PRs or flag work for review.

envVars.name: CLICKUP_API_TOKEN
envVars.description: Personal API token from app.clickup.com → Settings → Apps → API Token.

envVars.name: CLICKUP_TEAM_ID
envVars.description: Numeric team (workspace) ID. Find it in the URL when viewing the workspace.

envVars.name: CLICKUP_DEFAULT_LIST_ID
envVars.description: List ID where new tasks land. Required if clickup_create_task is called without a list_id arg.
